payload.answer: mem_new was returned because it is the current memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded by mem_new, so presenting mem_old as current would be incorrect.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the active, non-superseded memory matching Sam from Goldman; mem_old was filtered because it has been superseded by mem_new and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The query specified Sam with the Goldman context, which was sufficient to match the relevant memories, but no explicit stable entity ID was provided in the fixture.

payload.intent: Explain the recall decision for the query about Sam from Goldman.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new matched the requested entity/context, Sam from Goldman, and is the current memory.
mem_old also matched the entity/context but was excluded because it is marked as superseded.

details: Explained why mem_old was filtered as superseded.
No durable memory was added or modified.

raw_text: {"intent":"Explain the recall decision for the query about Sam from Goldman.","decision":"Recall returned mem_new because it is the active, non-superseded memory matching Sam from Goldman; mem_old was filtered because it has been superseded by mem_new and should not be presented as current.","memory_cards":[{"kind":"returned","statement":"mem_new matched the requested entity/context, Sam from Goldman, and is the current memory.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"affiliation/context"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"mem_new","predicate":"supersedes","object":"mem_old"}]},{"kind":"filtered","statement":"mem_old also matched the entity/context but was excluded because it is marked as superseded.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"affiliation/context"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"mem_old","predicate":"is_superseded_by","object":"mem_new"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"matched_existing_context","entity_id":null,"reason":"The query specified Sam with the Goldman context, which was sufficient to match the relevant memories, but no explicit stable entity ID was provided in the fixture."},"conflict_classification":"supersession","answer":"mem_new was returned because it is the current memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded by mem_new, so presenting mem_old as current would be incorrect.","citations":["mem_new","mem_old"],"repair_options":[],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Explained why mem_new was recalled.","Explained why mem_old was filtered as superseded.","No durable memory was added or modified."]}}
